name: GOLFTEC Clayton
address: 8857 Ladue Rd C, St. Louis, MO 63124
about: GOLFTEC is a golf training and club fitting facility specializing in data-driven instruction using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors. They offer personalized lesson plans for players of all skill levels, from beginners to seasoned golfers, with certified PGA coaches guiding the improvement process. The company also provides custom club fitting services, aiming to optimize equipment for individual swings, and operates locations across North America and internationally.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using advanced motion tracking and video analysis technology
Custom club fitting services with measurable results, claiming an average of 21 more yards off the tee
Access to training bays equipped with launch monitors and video feedback for practice sessions

food_and_drink.notes: No food or beverage service mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and fittings to help you find equipment that suits your swing. Their club fitting service starts at $95 and uses launch monitors to match you with the perfect gear.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The provided content does not mention any food or beverage service, suggesting outside food and drink are not a focus of this venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify a time for playing 18 holes, as the focus is on indoor practice, lessons, and fittings rather than a full simulator-based golf game experience.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While GOLFTEC offers lessons and fitting services suitable for various ages, the provided content does not specifically mention dedicated youth programs, kid-friendly amenities, or policies, so it's difficult to determine if it is marketed as a family-friendly destination.
